channel.title: AI Pickz
channel.description: Honest AI tool reviews and comparisons — every tool tested hands-on.

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Review 2025 — Google's Most Capable AI Model Yet
item.description: Two weeks testing Google Gemini 2.5 Pro and Flash: 1M token context window, coding, reasoning, multimodal, and real user stories from engineers and startup founders.

item.title: Windsurf Review 2025 — The AI Code Editor That's Making Cursor Nervous
item.description: Two weeks testing Windsurf, Codeium's AI code editor: Cascade agent mode, multi-file editing, real-time codebase understanding, and how it stacks up against Cursor and Copilot.

item.title: Leonardo AI Review 2025 — The Best AI Image Generator You've Never Heard Of?
item.description: Two weeks testing Leonardo AI: real-time generation, game asset creation, character consistency, and custom model training. Real stories from artists and game devs.

item.title: Sudowrite Review 2025 — Can AI Write Your Novel Without Sounding Like a Robot?
item.description: Two weeks testing Sudowrite: story generation, rewriting, character development, and the new Outline feature. Real stories from authors who use it for fiction.

item.title: Otter.ai Review 2025 — The AI Meeting Assistant That Actually Takes Notes for You
item.description: Two weeks testing Otter.ai: real-time transcription, meeting summaries, action items, and integrations with Zoom and Google Meet. Real stories from teams who use it daily.

item.title: Notion AI Review 2025 — Can AI Make Your Notes Actually Useful?
item.description: Two weeks testing Notion AI: AI writing, summarization, Q&A, and project management. Real user stories from freelancers, students, and teams who use it daily.

item.title: Canva Magic Studio Review 2025 — Can AI Make Design Actually Easy?
item.description: We tested Canva Magic Studio's AI features for a week — Magic Design, Magic Edit, Magic Write, Magic Eraser, and AI video. Real user stories and honest trade-offs.

item.title: This Week's Top 5 AI Tools — May 25, 2026
item.description: 5 AI tools worth your time this week: Hume AI for emotional voice, DeepSeek V3 for budget coding, Midjourney v7 for image generation, Grammarly for editing, and Copilot's new agent mode.

item.title: Hume AI Voice Review 2025 — The Most Emotional AI Voice I've Ever Heard
item.description: Hume AI's voice understands emotion — tone, pauses, emphasis. We put it head-to-head with ElevenLabs for podcasts, audiobooks, and voice assistants.

item.title: DeepSeek V3 Review 2025 — The $0.48 Model That Competes With GPT-4o
item.description: DeepSeek V3 costs 95% less than GPT-4o but matches it on coding and reasoning. We tested it on 10 real tasks — coding, reasoning, translation, and creative writing.

item.title: Midjourney vs DALL-E 3 2025 — Which AI Image Generator Is Better?
item.description: We tested Midjourney v7 vs DALL-E 3 on 10 real prompts: photorealism, text rendering, style consistency, prompt adherence, and artistic illustration. Clear winner for each use case.

item.title: Grammarly vs Jasper vs Copy.ai 2025 — Which AI Writing Tool Actually Saves You Time?
item.description: Three AI writing tools, one head-to-head test. We compared Grammarly, Jasper, and Copy.ai on 5 real writing tasks: cold emails, blog posts, ad copy, and editing.

item.title: GitHub Copilot Review 2025 — Is It Smarter Than Cursor Now?
item.description: Copilot's 2025 updates finally caught up to Cursor. Agent mode, multi-file editing, real codebase understanding. We tested them all head-to-head.

item.title: Claude vs ChatGPT Comparison 2025 — Which AI Assistant Actually Wins?
item.description: We tested Claude Sonnet 4 vs ChatGPT GPT-4o on 5 real tasks: writing, coding, translation, document analysis, brainstorming. Plus real user stories.

item.title: ElevenLabs AI Voice Generator Review 2025 — Better Than a Human Narrator?
item.description: Blind test: 8 people listened to ElevenLabs vs a real voice actor vs Google TTS. Plus real stories from creators who switched.

item.title: NotebookLM Review 2025 — Google's AI Notebook Is Way Better Than Expected
item.description: We tested Google's NotebookLM for a week: PDF summaries, multi-source cross-referencing, idea connections, and the surprisingly good AI podcast feature.

item.title: AI Video Generation Tools Compared 2025 — Sora vs Runway vs Pika vs Kling
item.description: We tested Sora, Runway Gen-3, Pika 2.0, and Kling head-to-head: text-to-video quality, motion realism, text rendering, and consistency across clips.

item.title: ChatGPT Free vs Paid 2025 — Is ChatGPT Plus Still Worth $20 a Month?
item.description: Two weeks testing ChatGPT Free vs Plus side by side: quality, message limits, DALL-E, Advanced Data Analysis, custom GPTs, and real user stories.

item.title: This Week's Top 5 AI Tools You Need to Try
item.description: Cursor, Perplexity, ElevenLabs, Gamma, NotebookLM — the best AI tools this week with real stories from people who use them.

item.title: 5 Free AI Tools Good Enough to Replace Paid Subscriptions
item.description: Stop paying $200/month for AI. These 5 free tools — Claude Free, Perplexity, Grammarly, Otter, Canva — can save you $1,260/year.

item.title: Cursor Deep Dive — Is AI-Assisted Coding Worth It?
item.description: Two weeks of real project testing: tab completion, multi-file refactoring, codebase Q&A. Honest review with real user stories.

item.title: Perplexity AI Review 2025 — Can AI Search Really Replace Google?
item.description: Two weeks testing Perplexity AI vs Google across 5 real tasks — quick facts, coding, research, shopping, and deep research. Plus real user stories.

item.title: Welcome to AI Pickz — Your Honest Guide to AI Tools
item.description: We're building the most honest, hands-on AI tool review site on the web. Here's what we're about and how we test every tool.
